utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item explicitly mentioned in the final property solution to the corresponding ground-truth item and provide its exact rating. The final solution includes selections for financing (Traditional Mortgage), legal services (Premium Legal Package), moving services (Standard Moving), and setup services including a property survey (Basic Survey) and utilities (Basic Utilities). The selected property is generically described and does not match a named property from the ground-truth list, so no property rating can be mapped. For each named service, we locate the exact match in the ground-truth ratings and extract the numeric rating.
